response.global_analysis: The video starts mid-bridge of 'Sekai wa Koi ni Ochiteiru' and follows with various cuts of the song (verse, pre-chorus, chorus). The audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON lyrics for those parts, though the video skips several sections. Dialogue follows the musical performance, introducing birthday merchandise. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, and mid-sentence pauses in the dialogue are handled by splitting blocks to maintain synchronization. Performance guests identified by nicknames (Aki-sama, Gozaru, Fuutan) are transcribed as spoken.

subtitles.original: …ちゃったかな
subtitles.english: ...I might have fallen?

subtitles.original: 自分のこと分からないまま
subtitles.english: Without even knowing myself,

subtitles.original: あの子にアドバイスまでしちゃって
subtitles.english: I even gave that girl advice.

subtitles.original: 胸が痛いや
subtitles.english: My heart aches.

subtitles.original: 世界は恋に落ちている
subtitles.english: The world is falling in love,

subtitles.original: 光の矢 胸を刺す
subtitles.english: an arrow of light strikes my chest.

subtitles.original: 気付いたこの想いはもう
subtitles.english: These feelings I've realized are already...

subtitles.original: 遅いの
subtitles.english: too late.

subtitles.original: あの子の方が可愛いの
subtitles.english: She is cuter than I am.

subtitles.original: 知ってるよ だけど
subtitles.english: I know that, but...

subtitles.original: うまくいかないでなんてね
subtitles.english: I hope things don't go well... just kidding.

subtitles.original: 逃げ出したいくせに
subtitles.english: Even though I want to run away.

subtitles.original: 「バカ」
subtitles.english: "Stupid."

subtitles.original: 君のこと全部わかりたいって思っちゃう
subtitles.english: I find myself wanting to understand you completely.

subtitles.original: これが恋だって初めて気づいたの
subtitles.english: I realized for the first time that this is love.

subtitles.original: 絶対振り向いてほしい
subtitles.english: I definitely want you to look my way.

subtitles.original: 遅かったけど 諦めたくない
subtitles.english: It was late, but I don't want to give up.

subtitles.original: だって好きだから
subtitles.english: Because I love you.

subtitles.original: 春に咲いた花が恋をした
subtitles.english: A flower that bloomed in spring fell in love.

subtitles.original: 花は必死に上を向いて笑った
subtitles.english: The flower desperately looked up and smiled.

subtitles.original: 青い夏の蕾も恋をした
subtitles.english: A blue summer bud also fell in love.

subtitles.original: 咲かない花と火薬の匂い
subtitles.english: An unbloomed flower and the smell of gunpowder.

subtitles.original: 本当の気持ち言葉にして
subtitles.english: Putting my true feelings into words,

subtitles.original: 大事なこと話せたら
subtitles.english: if I could talk about what's important,

subtitles.original: 今日もリスタート
subtitles.english: today is another restart.

subtitles.original: 鈍感な君だから
subtitles.english: Because you're so dense,

subtitles.original: 口に出して言わなきゃ
subtitles.english: I have to say it out loud.

subtitles.original: 今君に伝えるよ ねえ
subtitles.english: I'll tell you now, hey...

subtitles.original: 「好きです」
subtitles.english: "I love you."

subtitles.original: 世界は恋に落ちている
subtitles.english: The world is falling in love,

subtitles.original: 光の矢 胸を刺す
subtitles.english: an arrow of light strikes my chest.

subtitles.original: 全部わかりたいんだよ
subtitles.english: I want to understand everything.

subtitles.original: ねえ 聞かせて
subtitles.english: Hey, tell me.

subtitles.original: たぐり寄せてもう0センチ
subtitles.english: Pulling you closer, now zero centimeters away.

subtitles.original: 駆け抜けた日々に
subtitles.english: Through the days we ran through,

subtitles.original: 忘れない 忘れられない
subtitles.english: I won't forget, I can't forget

subtitles.original: 輝く1ページ
subtitles.english: this shining page.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで
subtitles.english: Alright! And with that,

subtitles.original: ここまではアキ様、ロボ子
subtitles.english: Aki-sama and Roboco,

subtitles.original: ござるにふーたんと一緒に
subtitles.english: along with Gozaru and Fuutan,

subtitles.original: 歌わせていただきました！
subtitles.english: performed these songs with me!

subtitles.original: みんなありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you, everyone!

subtitles.original: さてさて
subtitles.english: Now then,

subtitles.original: ここからはなんと重大告知が
subtitles.english: from here, I have some

subtitles.original: ２つあります！
subtitles.english: two major announcements!

subtitles.original: まず１つ目がこちら！どどん！
subtitles.english: First, here's the first one! *Drumroll*

subtitles.original: 癒月ちょこ誕生日記念
subtitles.english: Yuzuki Choco Birthday Celebration
2026 Merchandise!

subtitles.original: それではちょっと詳しくご紹介していきたいと思います。
subtitles.english: Now, I'd like to introduce them in more detail.

subtitles.original: まずはこちら！
subtitles.english: First is this!

subtitles.original: ちょこのクッション！
subtitles.english: Choco's Cushion!

subtitles.original: いやこれね、ちょこの誕生日といえば
subtitles.english: Well, you know, speaking of Choco's birthday,

subtitles.original: 毎年成瀬先生ありがとうございますということで
subtitles.english: saying thank you to Naruse-sensei every year,

subtitles.original: 今年も成瀬先生にめちゃめちゃ素敵なイラスト描き下ろしていただきました！
subtitles.english: Naruse-sensei has drawn another incredibly wonderful illustration for us this year!

subtitles.original: 今回のテーマはバレンタインということで
subtitles.english: This time the theme is Valentine's,

subtitles.original: チョコメイトを抱きながら
subtitles.english: so while holding a Chocomate,

subtitles.original: 今回はチョコレート風のクッションにしてみました！
subtitles.english: we made it into a chocolate-style cushion!

subtitles.original: 可愛いでしょ？
subtitles.english: It's cute, right?

subtitles.original: サイズ感がちょうど枕くらいになってるので
subtitles.english: The size is just about right for a pillow,

subtitles.original: お昼寝の時とか仮眠用に
subtitles.english: so for a nap or a rest,

subtitles.original: すやっとできる感じで使えちゃいます！
subtitles.english: you can use it to sleep soundly!

subtitles.original: そして続いてはこちら！
subtitles.english: And next is this!
